mnemonics: H- Hide the data in plain sight
keyPoints: Text-Basic features: Steganography and data hiding in plain text
Applications of data hiding: Secure communication, Digital watermarking
Watermarking: Invisible data embedding in digital media
Intuitive Methods: Data hiding in images and audio
Simple Digital methods: Least Significant Bit (LSB) substitution
Data hiding i: Invisible data transmission and storage
